zh.Evesham, Gloucestershire, England: 英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾
zh.Burley: 南非卡阿普洛文希布利
zh.lifeSummary: Sir Roger Burley是Roger Burley和Lucy Guildford的兒子，出生在英國賀福爾比利。他和Mrs. Roger Burley至少有3個兒子和2個女兒。他去世於大約1383年在英國英格蘭史洛普爾，埋葬在英國英格蘭。

zh-hans.Evesham, Gloucestershire, England: 英国英格兰格盧斯特斯爾
zh-hans.Burley: 南非卡阿普洛文希布利
zh-hans.lifeSummary: Sir Roger Burley是Roger Burley和Lucy Guildford的儿子，出生在英国賀福爾比利。他和Mrs. Roger Burley至少有3个儿子和2个女儿。他去世于大约1383年在英国英格兰史洛普爾，埋葬在英国英格兰。

nameMeanings.name: Burley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of various places called Burley, for example in Hampshire, Rutland, Shropshire, and Yorkshire, from Old English burh ‘fortified manor, stronghold’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’.
Americanized form of Swiss German Bürli: from a diminutive of būr ‘peasant, farmer’ (see Bauer ).

variants.name: Berley
meanings: English (Yorkshire): variant of   Burley  . This surname is now rare in Britain. It may also be a variant of   Birley  .
Americanized form of Swiss German Beerli, Berli, or Berly, and probably also of their South German cognate Behrle or of some other similar (like-sounding) surname. Compare Barley .

variants.name: Birley
meanings: English: habitational name from Birley in Ecclesfield (Yorkshire), East or North Bierley (Yorkshire), or Birley (Derbyshire).

variants.name: Burlew
meanings: Probably a variant of   Burley   1 or 2.

nameMeanings.name: Roger
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French personal name, Rog(i)er, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, from hrōd ‘fame’ + gār, gēr ‘spear’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain, replacing the native Old English form Hrōðgār. Roger was one of the most popular boys' names throughout the medieval period, but less so after the Reformation, though it has continued in regular use to the present day. Roger, Count of Sicily ( c.1031–1101 ), son of Tancred, recovered Sicily from the Arabs. His son, also called Roger, ruled Sicily as king, presiding over a court noted for its splendour and patronage of the arts.

variants.name: Rodger
meanings: Variant spelling of   Roger  , in part from the surname derived from the given name in the Middle Ages.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: Sir Roger Burley was born in Birley, Herefordshire, England as the son of Roger Burley and Lucy Guildford. He had at least 3 sons and 2 daughters with Mrs. Roger Burley. He died about 1383, in Shropshire, England, United Kingdom, and was buried in England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Sir Roger Burley est né à Birley, Herefordshire, Angleterre, fils de Roger Burley et Lucy Guildford. Il a eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles avec Mrs. Roger Burley. Il est décédé environ 1383, à Shropshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, et a été enterré à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Sir Roger Burley wurde in Birley, Herefordshire, England, als Sohn von Roger Burley und Lucy Guildford geboren. Er hatte mit Mrs. Roger Burley mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb um 1383 in Shropshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Sir Roger Burley è nato il nel Birley, Herefordshire, England come figlio di Roger Burley e Lucy Guildford. Lui avuto almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie con Mrs. Roger Burley. Morì circa 1383, nel Shropshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, e fu sepolto a Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.Birley, Herefordshire, England: イギリスハーエフォードシュアイアバーリー
ja.Evesham, Gloucestershire, England: イギリスイギリスグロウセステルシュアイア
ja.Burley: 南アフリカカアップロヴィンシブルリー

ja.Broomscroft, Shropshire, England: イギリスイギリスシュロプシュアイア
ja.Herefordshire, England: イギリスハーエフォードシュアイア
ja.lifeSummary: Sir Roger BurleyはイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアバーリーでRoger BurleyとLucy Guildfordの息子として生まれた。彼はMrs. Roger Burleyとの間に少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼は約1383年にイギリスイギリスシュロプシュアイアで死去し，イギリスイギリスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Roger Burley(은)는 영국 허퍼드실르 비를리에서 Roger Burley(와)과 Lucy Guildford의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 Mrs. Roger Burley(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1383년 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르에서 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Sir Roger Burley nasceu em Birley, Herefordshire, Inglaterra filho de Roger Burley e Lucy Guildford. Ele teve pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas com Mrs. Roger Burley. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1383, em Shropshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, e foi sepultado em Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Sir Roger Burley родился в местности бирли, хирефордшир, Англия. Его родителей звали Roger Burley и Lucy Guildford. У него было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери от Mrs. Roger Burley. Он умер около 1383 г. в местности шропшир, Англия, Великобритания и был похоронен в местности Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Sir Roger Burley nació en Birley, Herefordshire, Inglaterra como hijo de Roger Burley y Lucy Guildford. Tuvo por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas con Mrs. Roger Burley. Murió aproximadamente 1383, en Shropshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, y fue sepultado en Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
